name: backfill_prow_job_runs
description: Backfill denormalized prow_job_release column from prow_jobs table
query:
WITH batch AS (
				SELECT id FROM prow_job_runs
				WHERE prow_job_release IS NULL OR prow_job_release = ''
				LIMIT $1
			)
			UPDATE prow_job_runs r
			SET prow_job_release = j.release
			FROM prow_jobs j, batch
			WHERE r.id = batch.id
			AND r.prow_job_id = j.id

name: backfill_prow_job_run_tests
description: Backfill denormalized prow_job_id, prow_job_run_release, and prow_job_run_timestamp columns
query:
WITH batch AS (
				SELECT id FROM prow_job_run_tests
				WHERE prow_job_run_release IS NULL OR prow_job_run_release = ''
				LIMIT $1
			)
			UPDATE prow_job_run_tests t
			SET prow_job_id = r.prow_job_id,
				prow_job_run_release = j.release,
				prow_job_run_timestamp = r."timestamp"
			FROM prow_job_runs r
			JOIN prow_jobs j ON r.prow_job_id = j.id
			, batch
			WHERE t.prow_job_run_id = r.id
			AND t.id = batch.id

name: backfill_prow_job_run_test_outputs
description: Backfill denormalized prow_job_run_test_release and prow_job_run_test_timestamp columns
query:
WITH batch AS (
				SELECT id FROM prow_job_run_test_outputs
				WHERE prow_job_run_test_release IS NULL OR prow_job_run_test_release = ''
				LIMIT $1
			)
			UPDATE prow_job_run_test_outputs o
			SET prow_job_run_test_release = j.release,
				prow_job_run_test_timestamp = r."timestamp"
			FROM prow_job_run_tests t
			JOIN prow_job_runs r ON t.prow_job_run_id = r.id
			JOIN prow_jobs j ON r.prow_job_id = j.id
			, batch
			WHERE o.prow_job_run_test_id = t.id
			AND o.id = batch.id

name: backfill_prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests
description: Backfill denormalized prow_job_run_release and prow_job_run_timestamp columns in join table
query:
WITH batch AS (
				SELECT prow_job_run_id, prow_pull_request_id FROM prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests
				WHERE prow_job_run_release IS NULL OR prow_job_run_release = ''
				LIMIT $1
			)
			UPDATE prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests pp
			SET prow_job_run_release = j.release,
				prow_job_run_timestamp = r."timestamp"
			FROM prow_job_runs r
			JOIN prow_jobs j ON r.prow_job_id = j.id
			, batch
			WHERE pp.prow_job_run_id = r.id
			AND pp.prow_job_run_id = batch.prow_job_run_id
			AND pp.prow_pull_request_id = batch.prow_pull_request_id

name: backfill_prow_job_run_annotations
description: Backfill denormalized prow_job_run_release and prow_job_run_timestamp columns
query:
WITH batch AS (
				SELECT id FROM prow_job_run_annotations
				WHERE prow_job_run_release IS NULL OR prow_job_run_release = ''
				LIMIT $1
			)
			UPDATE prow_job_run_annotations a
			SET prow_job_run_release = j.release,
				prow_job_run_timestamp = r."timestamp"
			FROM prow_job_runs r
			JOIN prow_jobs j ON r.prow_job_id = j.id
			, batch
			WHERE a.prow_job_run_id = r.id
			AND a.id = batch.id
